body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Oceanic states of consciousness-an existential-neuroscience perspective.** — Front Hum Neurosci (2025). DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2025.1653801. PMID: 40860325. Oceanic states of consciousness-characterized by ego dissolution, unity, and timelessness-have long occupied a liminal space between psychopathology and transcendence. This paper explores these states through the interdisciplinary lens of existential neuroscience, integrating insights from psychoanalysis, existentialism, affective neuroscience, and psychedelic research.
